sentences.arabic: رَأَى الطِّفْلُ غَرِيبًا وَسَأَلَ أَبَاهُ عَنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je vidjelo stranca i pitalo oca za njega.
sentences.translationEn: The child saw a stranger and asked his father about him.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: هُوَ مُسَافِرٌ مِثْلُنَا يَزُورُ الْمَدِينَةَ.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: On je putnik kao mi koji posjećuje grad.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: He is a traveler like us visiting the city.

sentences.arabic: ابْتَسَمَ الطِّفْلُ لِلرَّجُلِ وَقَالَ لَهُ: أَهْلًا.
sentences.translation: Dijete se nasmiješilo čovjeku i reklo mu: Dobrodošao.
sentences.translationEn: The child smiled at the man and said: Welcome.

sentences.translation: Čovjek je odvratio osmijehom i zahvalio djetetu.
sentences.translationEn: The man responded with a smile and thanked the child.
